select.name: total_orders
select.description: Number of unique orders containing this product

metrics.name: metric_product_order_count
metrics.label: Orders Containing Product
metrics.ai_hint: Use this to understand product popularity and which items are frequently purchased together

select.name: total_items_sold
select.description: Total quantity of this product sold

metrics.name: metric_total_items_sold
metrics.label: Total Items Sold
metrics.ai_hint: Use this to analyze product sales volume and inventory demand for best-selling items

metrics.name: metric_avg_items_per_order
metrics.label: Average Items Per Order
metrics.ai_hint: Use this to understand typical order quantities for inventory and fulfillment planning
